name: @romanbakurov/vellira-tokens
description: Design tokens for Vellira Design System
author: Roman Bakurov

scripts.clean: node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:tokens && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
